issues.description: Missing error sanitization before logging - could expose sensitive data in production logs
issues.suggested_fix: Implement error sanitization that redacts sensitive information (PII, tokens, passwords) before logging

issues.description: Hardcoded console reference - makes testing difficult and couples to global console object
issues.suggested_fix: Accept Console instance via constructor injection or use inject(Console) for better testability

issues.description: Potential unhandled promise rejection when injector.destroyed is true and userErrorHandler is not yet initialized
issues.suggested_fix: Add proper error handling with setTimeout and rethrow or log appropriately when userErrorHandler is not available

issues.description: Event listeners are added on every DestroyRef destruction, could lead to memory leaks if not properly cleaned up
issues.suggested_fix: Ensure proper cleanup of event listeners and consider using WeakMap or other memory-efficient patterns

issues.description: Abstract class with multiple abstract get() overloads but no implementation - could cause confusion for implementers
issues.suggested_fix: Provide clearer documentation or split into more specific interfaces

issues.description: Static create method with confusing overload signatures that accept both array and object forms
issues.suggested_fix: Simplify API by having separate named methods or clearer type discrimination

issues.description: No validation of providers array - could lead to runtime errors if invalid providers are passed
issues.suggested_fix: Add validation of provider types and throw meaningful errors early

issues.description: Static ɵprov property uses /* @__PURE__ */ comment but could still be treeshaken incorrectly in some bundlers
issues.suggested_fix: Ensure proper tree-shaking annotations and consider using ES6 import/export for better dead code elimination

issues.description: File serves mainly as re-exports - could be consolidated to reduce bundle size
issues.suggested_fix: Consider consolidating re-exports into more specific files or using barrel files only where necessary

issues.description: Circular dependency risk between metadata files - each exports from others
issues.suggested_fix: Review and potentially refactor to reduce circular dependencies

issues.description: Abstract class with many methods but no clear separation of concerns - could be split into smaller interfaces
issues.suggested_fix: Consider splitting into ViewRef, ChangeDetectionRef, and other specific interfaces

issues.description: markForCheck() is abstract - implementations may have performance implications if not optimized
issues.suggested_fix: Ensure implementations use efficient dirty checking and avoid unnecessary change detection cycles

issues.description: injectChangeDetectorRef function uses non-null assertion (!) on getCurrentTNode() - could throw if called at wrong time
issues.suggested_fix: Add proper null checks or document when this can be called safely

issues.description: createViewRef returns null! (non-null assertion) but could return null in some cases - type safety issue
issues.suggested_fix: Handle null case properly or adjust return type to be nullable

issues.description: Large file with many exports (over 100) - violates single responsibility principle and makes maintenance difficult
issues.suggested_fix: Split into multiple files based on functionality (e.g., template parsing, code generation, error handling)

issues.description: Comment indicates all compiler APIs are experimental and private, but they're still exported - could be misused
issues.suggested_fix: Keep APIs truly private (underscore naming) or provide stable public APIs with proper versioning

issues.description: Global side effect at the bottom (publishFacade(global)) - could cause unexpected behavior in module systems
issues.suggested_fix: Move side effects into explicit initialization functions that must be called

issues.description: Massive import * as core from './core' - could lead to tree shaking issues and unclear dependencies
issues.suggested_fix: Import only specific needed exports to improve tree shaking and code clarity

issues.description: File is mainly a barrel re-export - could be optimized to only export what's needed
issues.suggested_fix: Consider using more targeted exports or dynamic imports for tree shaking

issues.description: Exports private symbols from './private_export' - could leak internal APIs
issues.suggested_fix: Review and remove any unintended private API exports

issues.description: BrowserDomAdapter directly manipulates DOM and warns about XSS risks but lacks proper sanitization methods
issues.suggested_fix: Add built-in XSS protection and sanitization for common operations like setAttribute, setInnerHTML

issues.description: onAndCancel method doesn't handle errors from event listeners - uncaught exceptions could occur
issues.suggested_fix: Wrap listener calls in try-catch and provide error reporting mechanism

issues.description: getDefaultDocument() returns global document - could cause issues in SSR environments where document is not available
issues.suggested_fix: Make document injection optional or provide SSR-safe fallback

issues.description: getGlobalEventTarget method is deprecated but still present - should be removed to avoid misuse
issues.suggested_fix: Remove deprecated method entirely or provide migration path

issues.description: Extremely large class (over 800 lines) - violates single responsibility and makes maintenance very difficult
issues.suggested_fix: Split Router into smaller focused classes (NavigationManager, UrlSerializer, etc.)

issues.description: Multiple private Subject/EventEmitter instances that could cause memory leaks if not properly unsubscribed
issues.suggested_fix: Use async operators and ensure proper cleanup in ngOnDestroy

issues.description: scheduleNavigation catches errors but only logs to INTERNAL_APPLICATION_ERROR_HANDLER - could miss critical failures
issues.suggested_fix: Add more robust error handling with retry logic and better error reporting

issues.description: Many deprecated properties still present (routeReuseStrategy, onSameUrlNavigation) - clutters API
issues.suggested_fix: Mark as deprecated with clear migration paths and plan removal in next major version

issues.description: Simple NgModule that only exports other modules - could be replaced with a more flexible composition pattern
issues.suggested_fix: Consider using feature flags or dynamic module loading instead of static exports

issues.description: Barrel file with many exports - could be split into smaller, more focused entry points
issues.suggested_fix: Use smaller barrel files or direct imports to improve tree shaking

issues.description: Backwards compatibility re-export of DOCUMENT from '@angular/core' at the bottom - confusing placement
issues.suggested_fix: Move all exports to the top and remove redundant re-exports

issues.description: Deprecated directive (deprecated 20.0) still present in codebase - should be removed to avoid confusion
issues.suggested_fix: Remove NgForOf and replace with @for block implementation entirely

issues.description: NgForOfContext class creates new objects on each iteration - could cause GC pressure for large lists
issues.suggested_fix: Consider object pooling or more efficient context management

issues.description: ngDoCheck tries to create differ but catches errors only in dev mode - production errors could be silent
issues.suggested_fix: Add proper error handling in production mode as well

issues.description: forEachOperation called on every change detection cycle - could be expensive for large lists
issues.suggested_fix: Optimize change detection algorithm or add memoization for stable lists

issues.description: Static ngTemplateContextGuard method always returns true - could be simplified or made more type-safe
issues.suggested_fix: Review type guard implementation and ensure it provides real type safety
